howItWorks.intro: This debt snowball calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Snowball
rules.formula: Pay minimum on all, throw extra at smallest debt
rules.explanation: Freed-up payments roll into the next debt for accelerating payoff.

howItWorks.outro: Tax laws and financial markets change frequently. Verify current rates with your financial institution.

faq.a: Pay off smallest debt first for motivation wins, then roll payments to next debt.
Snowball targets smallest balance. Avalanche targets highest interest rate.

howWeCalculate.intro: This debt snowball calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
